name: infinite-marquee
title: Infinite Marquee
description: A looping marquee primitive for logos, tags, and feature pills.

name: live-code-compilation

name: micro-scale-fade
title: Micro Scale Fade
description: A tiny scale-and-opacity transition for UI state changes.

name: opencode
title: OpenCode
description: A terminal-first coding agent surface with streaming task output.

name: pricing-tier-focus
title: Pricing Tier Focus
description: Pricing cards shift focus from free to pro with spotlight emphasis.

name: progress-steps
title: Progress Steps
description: A multi-step progress indicator with active, pending, and done states.

name: registry
title: Registry
description: A catalog registry card for showing installable component metadata.

name: remocn-ui
title: Remocn UI
description: A compact kit card that explains the remocn primitives now available in HyperFrames.

name: select-item
title: Select Item
description: A select-row primitive with check mark, hint, and active highlight.

name: skeleton-block
title: Skeleton Block
description: A skeleton loading block that resolves into real content.

name: spatial-push
title: Spatial Push
description: A physical depth transition that presses the old scene backward.

name: spotlight-card
title: Spotlight Card
description: A card with a scripted cursor spotlight and lit border.

title: Terminal Simulator
description: A terminal window types commands and streams log output.

title: Terminal to Browser Deploy
description: Terminal deploy logs hand off into a live browser preview.

name: tool-menu-slide-in
title: Tool Menu Slide In

name: v0
title: v0
description: A prompt-to-interface agent surface with generated component preview.

description: A social follow card with avatar, handle, and follower motion.

title: X Followers Overview
description: A social analytics card with count-up and audience pills.

name: zoom-through-transition
title: Zoom Through Transition
description: A transition that zooms through a focal card into the next scene.

name: arc-motion-path

name: three-orbiting-cards
title: Three Orbiting Cards

name: three-particle-ribbon

name: shader-displacement-panel

name: camera-rig-depth-stack

name: orbital-feature-path
